chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ الْمَرْأَةَ وَ يَتَزَوَّجُ أُمَّ وَلَدِ أَبِيهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The man marries the woman, and he marries the mother of the child of her father

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/79)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/79)
text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) فَسَأَلَهُ صَفْوَانُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ ابْنَةَ رَجُلٍ وَ لِلرَّجُلِ امْرَأَةٌ وَ أُمُّ وَلَدٍ فَمَاتَ أَبُو الْجَارِيَةِ أَ يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ الْمُتَزَوِّجِ امْرَأَتُهُ وَ أُمُّ وَلَدِهِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ

en.hubeali: From him, from Imran Bin Musa, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Hameed from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl who said,

‘I was in the presence of Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, so Safwan asked him<sup>asws</sup> about a man who married a daughter of a man and for the man was a wife and a mother of the children. So the father of the girl died, is it Permissible for the man to marry his wife and a mother of his children?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with it.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ‘Imran ibn Musa from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who has said the following: “Once I was with al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when Safwan asked about a man who has married the daughter of a man and the man has a woman and a mother of child. The father of the girl dies; if this man can marry the wife and mother of the child of the deceased. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.’”
